commit.subject: LU-20076 tests: speed up sanity test_123a
commit.message:
LU-20076 tests: speed up sanity test_123a

Sanity test_123a can run too long in Janitor testing while trying
to create a very large number of files for the test.  Exit the
test loop at the end of the iteration if creates take too long.

Use "find | xargs unlink" to delete the files instead of "rm -r"
to avoid taking forever for "rm" to stat all of the files first.

This subtest was timing out on Janitor after 60 minutes, and can
now finish in about 30 minutes.

Test-Parameters: trivial
Signed-off-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@thelustrecollective.com>
Change-Id: I23da66331107eafa1a6ff3ae33d882d34a0e28f0
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/65142
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Timothy Day <timday@thelustrecollective.com>
Reviewed-by: Arshad Hussain <arshad.hussain@aeoncomputing.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
